page: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Easv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor using the x86_64 architecture, featuring 32 physical cores and 64 virtual CPUs with hyper-threading enabled. The system allocates dedicated CPU resources and includes 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate strong compute and memory performance. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and PassMark CPU scores rank in the top tier (top 10%), supported by advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration flags like AES and SHA_NI. Multi-core performance and memory bandwidth tests, including large-block read and write operations, consistently place in the top 25%. Database operations and memory scores on PassMark also reach the top 10% tier, while Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput perform in the top 25%.

Given its high memory density of 16 GB per vCPU and top-tier database benchmark results, this server type offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a specialized choice for workloads relying on external Premium Storage. It is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Easv7 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 physical cores, 64 dedicated vCPUs, and 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high ratio of 16.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs but is Premium Storage capable. In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier performance, with single-core CPU execution, PassMark memory scores, and database operations ranking in the top 10%. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations place in the top 25%. This hardware profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including large databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity without local storage requirements.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, delivering top-tier database and memory benchmark performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC processor, built for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four virtual CPUs and one terabyte of RAM for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores.
Equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 16.0 GB memory-to-core ratio.
Top-tier benchmark performance in single-core CPU, memory, and database operations.
No local storage or GPU included, but supports Premium Storage.
Best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
